---
name: Skill request
about: Suggest a new VAR channel skill
title: "[SKILL] skill-name — short description"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What VAR channel task does this skill cover?**
Describe the workflow or problem this skill would solve.

**When should an agent trigger this skill?**
e.g. "When the user wants to..."

**What inputs would it need?**
List the required and optional inputs.

**What output should it produce?**
Describe the expected output format.

**Why isn't an existing skill sufficient?**
Which existing skills did you consider, and why don't they cover this case?

**Are you willing to draft the skill?**
- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR
- [ ] No, just suggesting
